display_text: Arc Warden Aghanim's Scepter: Flux silences when the target is alone, deals more damage, and lasts longer. This upgrade counters solo heroes and split-pushers by applying a punishing silence and amplified damage, forcing enemies to stay grouped or suffer heavy penalties.
search_text: Arc Warden Aghanim Scepter anti-split-push silence isolation counter-disable solo hero punishment

display_text: Arc Warden Aghanim's Shard: When Spark Wraith activates, a secondary Spark Wraith fuses to the next closest target, dealing 80% damage. This upgrade counters grouped enemies and teamfight positioning, adding area denial and punishing clumped formations with additional burst damage.
search_text: Arc Warden Aghanim Shard anti-grouping area denial teamfight positioning Spark Wraith chain damage
